name: Rishiri SNS Approval Publisher
description: Blueprint for polling approved SNS posts from Google Sheets and publishing only after human approval. Configure credentials and API endpoints in n8n before activation.

source_sheet.approval_rule: status=approved AND fact_check_status=ok AND scheduled_at_jst<=now_jst AND published_at_jst is blank AND NOT(island campaign scheduled after September 30)

settings.note: Read all rows, then filter in Code node. Keep API credentials in n8n credentials, not in the sheet.

workflow.purpose: Filter approved rows due for publication.

settings.note: Replace API version/page-id and add page access token credential in n8n.
Instagram publishing is a two-step media container + publish flow. asset_url must be publicly accessible.
Confirm X API plan, posting limits, and link-post costs before enabling.
Use the current Threads API create/publish flow and permissions. Confirm in Meta Developer dashboard before enabling.
If stable official posting API is unavailable, send approved article body to the user as a manual-post notification instead of auto-publishing.
Generate share text and notify user. Do not mass-send through LINE without separate approval and duplicate-notification checks.

implementation_notes: Start with dry_run mode and write would-be publish logs to review_notes.
Enable one platform at a time, starting with Facebook or Instagram if Meta credentials are ready.
Do not enable X until API plan/cost is confirmed.
Treat note and LINE as semi-automatic unless a reliable official posting path is available.
Do not auto-publish rishiri_island/island-audience posts scheduled after September 30; switch to record aggregation and accuracy analysis.
Always keep human approval in Google Sheets as the final gate.
